race.comment: FORTYTHREEBEANS (8) has chased gamely to the line here in her first two starts, her last run full of merit in a strong maiden on Cup Day. Peaking now but only needs to hold her form to be winning. BURNING ISSUES (3) wound up strongly last time at the end of 1400m at Albury to finish a head away in second. Cherry-ripe third-up and if they can utilise the low draw this time, he will prove a handful to hold out. IROQUAI (10) closed off strongly last start to finish a close third over the 900m burner at Albury. Rock-hard fit now and is among the better chances. APPLE EYES (7) was much better last time at Albury when closing off well from midfield to nab third. At his top now and is in the mix.
